sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31606" key="e(kateri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑκᾰτερ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a dance with <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χειρῶν κίνησις,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:102" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.102</biblScope> </bibl> (but cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑκατερέω</foreign>).</entryFree>
